title: Lock for a motor vehicle
abstract: The object of the invention is a lock for a motor vehicle, in particular an electrically actuatable lock (1), having a locking mechanism (2) with a rotary latch (7) and at least one pawl (9), wherein the rotary latch (7) can be latched by means of the pawl at least in a main latching position (19), and having another latching element (8) which is located in the engagement area between the rotary latch (7) and the pawl (9) and is arranged on the rotary latch, wherein the latching element (8) is pivotably accommodated in the rotary latch (7), and a rolling movement is possible between the latching element (8) and the pawl (9), wherein the pawl (9) can be brought into engagement with the rotary latch (7).
claims: Claims Claims 1 . A lock for a motor vehicle, in particular an electrically actuatable lock (1 ), having a locking mechanism (2) with a rotary latch (7) and at least one pawl (9), wherein the rotary latch (7) can be latched by means of the pawl at least in a main latching position (19), and having another latching element (8) which is located in the engagement area between the rotary latch (7) and the pawl (9) and is arranged on the rotary latch, wherein the latching element (8) is pivotably accommodated in the rotary latch (7), and a rolling movement is possible between the latching element (8) and the pawl (9), characterized in that the pawl (9) can be brought into engagement with the rotary latch (7). 2. The lock (1 ) for a motor vehicle according to claim 1 , characterized in that the pawl (9) can be brought into engagement with the rotary latch (7) in a bearing area (13) of the latching element (8). 3. The lock (1 ) for a motor vehicle according to one of claims 1 or 2, characterized in that the bearing area (13) can be formed as an extended contact surface (15) of the bearing point (13) for the latching element. 4. The lock (1 ) for a motor vehicle according to one of claims 1 to 3, characterized in that the rotary latch (7) is arranged substantially above an entry area (18) of a lock holder (6) of the lock (1 ) for a motor vehicle lock (1 ). 5. The lock (1 ) for a motor vehicle according to one of claims 1 to 4, characterized in that the latching element (8) is arranged above the entry area (18) of a lock holder (6) in the motor vehicle lock (1 ). 6. The lock (1 ) for a motor vehicle according to one of claims 1 to 5, characterized in that the pawl (9) can be brought into engagement with the rotary latch (7) and the latching element (8) in a prelatching position. 7. The lock (1 ) for a motor vehicle according to one of claims 1 to 6, characterized in that an axis of rotation (20) of the rotary latch (7) is arrangeable substantially behind an end of an entry area (18) of a lock holder (6) in a lock plate (22). 8. The lock (1 ) for a motor vehicle according to one of claims 1 to 7, characterized in that an axis of rotation (21 ) of the pawl (9) can be arranged substantially behind one end of an entry area (18) of a lock holder (6) in a lock plate (22). 9. The lock (1 ) for a motor vehicle according to one of claims 1 to 8, characterized in that the axis of rotation (20) of the rotary latch (7) can be formed as a fastening point for the motor vehicle lock (1 ). 10. The lock (1 ) for a motor vehicle according to one of claims 1 to 9, characterized in that at least the locking mechanism parts (7, 8, 9) are essentially formed from a metallic material, in particular a steel.
